signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Users & Alpenglow Upgrade Announced | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Users & Alpenglow Upgrade Announced | YES | HIGH confidence**

On April 14, Solana reached an all-time record of **167 million monthly token holders** with daily non-vote transactions hitting 148 million.[3] The network announced the **Alpenglow consensus upgrade**, which aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds.[3] This represents a signific

signals.headline: Trump Gold Card Program Officially Enacted | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Gold Card Program Officially Enacted | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump has officially launched the "Trump Gold Card" immigration program, an expedited visa initiative that allows wealthy foreigners to obtain immigration benefits similar to a green card.[1][2][4] The program went live on the announced date, with the administration reporting $1.3 billion in sales within days of launch

signals.headline: Drift Protocol Hack - $280M Stolen | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol Hack - $280M Stolen | YES | HIGH confidence**

On April 1, the Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked, with attackers withdrawing at least $280 million through a sophisticated social engineering attack targeting security council members.[7] This represents a material security incident for the Solana ecosystem.

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February but below market forecasts of 2.4%.** [1]
